current_visual_risks: Physical cover sources are incomplete for many controlled books, so customer UI must use deterministic graphical runtime fallbacks.
Preview validation is blocked by Vercel Deployment Protection and must not be counted as real app browser evidence.
Prior home/library typography was perceived as oversized and claustrophobic.
cover_risks: Missing physical front/back cover source files could otherwise look plain or typographic.
Generated raster covers would risk asset weight and review burden; runtime SVG fallbacks avoid this for now.
Cover fallback must never imply audiobook approval.
typography_risks: Reducing font sizes too far could harm accessibility; changes keep readable clamp ranges and line-height.
Book detail and card hierarchy must remain clear after calmer scale reductions.
performance_risks: Large cover assets or eager shelf rendering could regress LCP; noncritical covers remain lazy/runtime lightweight.
Visual smoke must use same-origin proxy, not plain static server, because API fallback-to-index masks data errors.
release_gate_risks: Audio CTA remains gated; A Ghost Story spotlight no longer defaults on without explicit approved evidence slug.
Cover and typography changes do not mutate production metadata or audio state.
rollback_plan: Revert cover resolver/image source changes if fallback behavior regresses UI or performance.
Revert typography clamp reductions if accessibility or layout regressions appear.
Keep audio release safety code unchanged unless a release-gate regression is found.

cover_audit.performance_policy: Runtime SVG cover fallback is deterministic, lightweight, text-free, and lazy-loaded through BookCoverImage for non-LCP surfaces.
cover_audit.release_gate_policy: Cover fallback does not change reader/audiobook release state and does not expose audio controls.

preview.reason: Vercel Deployment Protection redirects browser/curl validation to the login shell without VERCEL_AUTOMATION_BYPASS_SECRET or shareable preview link.
preview.safe_validation_used: local production-equivalent same-origin proxy at http://127.0.0.1:4173
preview.required_owner_action: Provide VERCEL_AUTOMATION_BYPASS_SECRET or a shareable preview link, then rerun visual smoke against the preview with the bypass header.
